block_00: Your proof of address will expire soon
block_02: We are writing to inform you that your proof of residence will expire in 1 day and your account will no longer be verified. It is the Company’s lawful responsibility under the Anti-money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Law for the prevention and suppression of money laundering and terrorist financing to request and maintain updated documentation for every trader (once per year).
block_03: Therefore, you are kindly requested to provide us with one of the following:
block_04: Utility bill (electricity, phone, water, internet, etc.);
block_05: Bank statement or letter regarding your bank account;
block_06: Tax bill from your tax authority;
block_07: Stamped residence certificate from your municipality.
block_08: The document to be provided must show your full name, address, logo or stamp of the company/bank/municipality and the date of issue (not older than 6 months).
block_09: Please provide only full or half page copies of the document (cropped or blurry documents shall not be accepted).
block_10: We appreciate your cooperation in this matter and remain at your disposal.

block_15: Thank you for choosing our company!
